features: Deep Sleep Support with Calming Lavender & Chamomile: This pillow spray for sleep combines soothing essential oils to help you drift into restful slumber; simply spritz onto your pillow before bed for a tranquil wind-down ritual
Natural Sleep Spray for Peaceful Nights: Feather and Down pillow mist harnesses the power of lavender and chamomile to promote quality rest; perfect for establishing a calming bedtime routine

Effortless Pre-Sleep Ritual in Seconds: Easy-to-use sleep spray dispenser makes it simple to transform your bedroom into a sanctuary; one quick application primes your mind and senses for rejuvenating rest
Cruelty-Free & Vegan Sleep Solution: This lavender pillow spray is a guilt-free wellness choice for conscious consumers seeking natural sleep aids for adults
UK's No.1 Sleep Brand with 100 ml of Premium Quality: Trusted by thousands for restful nights. *Data Source: Kantar - 52 weeks data ending 14th April 2024 - Sleep Toiletries.
description: Product Description Feather & Down Sweet Dreams Pillow Spray (100ml) An infusion of lavender and chamomile essential oils to help reduce an anxious mind and encourage calm to aid a restful night's sleep. Sink into your pillow, close your eyes and relax to the soothing fragrance allowing your mind to wander before waking from a calming sleep. Sleep fact: research shows that lavender increases the type of brain waves associated with relaxation. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Parfum (Fragrance), PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Trideceth-9, Sodium Benzoate, Disodium EDTA, Citric Acid, Propylene Glycol, 2-Bromo-2-Nitropropane-1,3-Diol, Anthemis Nobilis Flower Oil, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Herb Oil, Linalool, Coumarin, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Limonene. Directions Simply spritz onto your pillow before bedtime for a soothing and relaxing atmosphere. Safety Warning Avoid direct contact with the eyes. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with clean water. For external use only. KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. See more

specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Natural Ingredients, Not Tested On Animals, Scented
